tagline: From Soil to Market - One Smart Farming Companion
authHeroText: Sign in with your mobile number and OTP to unlock farm intelligence.
loginPrompt: Access your farm dashboard quickly and securely.
signupPrompt: Create your farming profile in minutes.
otpHint: Use the demo OTP shown below
authMockNote: This app uses a demo OTP flow for testing the UI.
dashboardHeroText: Monitor crop health, automate irrigation, and find the right market from one place.
soilTestingSubtitle: Check nutrients and soil health instantly.
smartSeedingSubtitle: Get crop suggestions based on soil intelligence.
autoIrrigationSubtitle: Control pump and moisture with smart automation.
pestDetectionSubtitle: Detect diseases from images and take action.
weatherMonitoringSubtitle: Track current and upcoming weather patterns.
storageMonitoringSubtitle: Find nearby storage facilities and capacity.
buyerMatchSubtitle: Connect with buyers nearby for faster sales.
govtSchemesSubtitle: Discover schemes, benefits, and apply quickly.
quickModulesSubtitle: Tap a card to open the module.
weatherSummaryText: Cloudy skies with a chance of showers later in the day.
rainExpectedMessage: Prepare field drainage and reduce irrigation before evening.
pestDetectedMessage: Possible pest activity reported in the paddy field.
irrigationRequiredMessage: Soil moisture has dropped below the desired range.
marketPriceIncreasedMessage: Paddy prices have improved in nearby wholesale markets.
buyerMatchQuickAction: Open buyer discovery and pricing tools.
balancedSoil: Balanced soil with stable crop growth potential.
nitrogenBoost: Increase nitrogen using compost and nitrogen-rich fertilizers.
lowerPh: Lower pH with organic matter and balanced amendments.
seedingEmptyState: Generate a soil report to unlock crop recommendations.
blastTreatment: Use copper-based spray and improve field aeration.
leafCurlTreatment: Remove affected leaves and apply neem extract.
stemBorerTreatment: Use pheromone traps and targeted bio-control.
pestHistorySubtitle: Recent image scans and treatment notes.
yesterdayWeatherText: Warm afternoon, light winds, and no significant rainfall across most fields.
schemePmKisanDescription: Direct benefit support for eligible landholding farmers.
schemeSolarPumpDescription: Subsidy assistance for solar irrigation pump installation.
schemeSolarPumpBenefit: Reduce electricity dependency and energy cost.
schemeSolarPumpEligibility: Farmers with irrigation demand and approved land records.
schemeSolarPumpLastDate: Apply before the next subsidy cycle.
schemeCropInsuranceDescription: Coverage against loss from weather and crop damage.
schemeCropInsuranceBenefit: Financial protection for crop loss events.
schemeStorageSubsidyDescription: Support for building and improving storage capacity.
schemeStorageSubsidyBenefit: Reduce post-harvest losses and improve sale timing.
schemeStorageSubsidyEligibility: Farmer groups and eligible producer organizations.
